expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with at least 5 user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Task Statuses",
  "branchName": "task-statuses",
  "description": "Add task status tracking and filtering to task list.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add task status persistence with pending default",
      "description": "As a product team, I want each task to store a status value so that task state persists and existing records default to pending.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add `status` column to tasks storage with allowed values `pending`, `in_progress`, and `done`",
        "Backfill existing tasks to `pending` and enforce default `pending` for new tasks",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/*add-task-status*",
        "src/db/schema/tasks.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Implement backend status update operation",
      "description": "As a user, I want status changes saved from the task list so that task progress updates persist immediately.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Provide backend action or endpoint to update task status by task id",
        "Reject unsupported status values and return validation errors for invalid input",
        "Persist status updates and return updated task payload",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/tasks/*",
        "src/api/tasks/*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Show task status badge on task cards",
      "description": "As a user, I want each task card to show a status badge so that I can quickly scan progress.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task cards render status badge for pending, in_progress, and done states",
        "Badge text and styling are distinct per status",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/tasks/TaskCard.*",
        "src/components/tasks/StatusBadge.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add status control in task list rows",
      "description": "As a user, I want to change task status directly from the task list so that updates are fast during triage.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task list rows include a status selector with pending, in_progress, and done options",
        "Changing selector value calls backend status update and refreshes row state",
        "Failed updates show inline error feedback and revert optimistic state if used",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/tasks/TaskListRow.*",
        "src/hooks/tasks/*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Filter task list by status",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter tasks by status so that I can focus on pending, in-progress, or done work.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task list includes status filter options All, Pending, In Progress, and Done",
        "Selected filter limits rendered task rows to matching status",
        "Filter state persists while user remains on task list route",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/tasks/TaskFilters.*",
        "src/components/tasks/TaskList.*",
        "src/server/tasks/query*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}
